wiki.title: Wikelo
wiki.extract:
Wikelo is a Banu trader and mission giver based in Stanton. He is the first non-human NPC added to Star Citizen.

"Wikelo recently retired [...] from a fabrication Souli in the Banu Protectorate, he loves people, he loves humans, so he decided to move to human space and set up sort of a fabrication shop/trading site location for players to go visit and basically he can kind of make you some cool stuff if you bring him what he needs."
wiki.description: Wikelo is a Banu trader based in Stanton.

wiki.extract:
The San'tok.yāi 
is an export model of the Xi'an military medium fighter of the same name, developed by the Aopoa Corporation. This ship is specifically designed for the human civilian market and incorporates advanced Xi'an flight systems, enhanced dual-vector thrusters, and improved armament.

wiki.title: Crucible
wiki.extract: The Anvil Crucible (commonly referred as the flying toolbox) is the company's first dedicated repair ship. Featuring a rotating control bridge and a detachable pressurized workspace, the Crucible is a versatile mobile garage equipped with repair arms, a drone operation center and all the equipment needed to overhaul a damaged craft back into fighting shape.
wiki.description: Large heavy repair ship manufactured by Anvil

intro_mission.name: Wikelo Arrive to System
intro_mission.description: Hello, I am Wikelo. Recent addition to your system and very excited to be here. Spent many time here in UEE and happy to spent more. Have place where I make things from other things. Need person to bring me useful things to finish project I work on. You have list. Get, please. I am at . Will give you item for your help. Also, when done, if you want to do more. Have many things can make in my humble shop. Come, look at pretty poster and then decide what you want me to make. Bye.

wiki.title: Caterpillar Best In Show Edition
wiki.extract: The Caterpillar Best In Show Edition is a distinctive variant of the Caterpillar large cargo ship, manufactured by Drake Interplanetary. This special edition was created especially for the 'Best In Show' event at the Intergalactic Aerospace Expo 2949 and has a unique white and purple livery. The Caterpillar has gained a reputation as a reliable and cost-effective multi-role vessel, adept for various uses, including commercial operations and combat support. It is acknowledged as a strong alternative to the popular Hull series, providing significant firepower and a wide array of customization possibilities.
wiki.description: Ship

Karna Rifle.location: The Karna Rifle, produced by Kastak Arms, is a plasma-based, selective-fire assault rifle with a maximum effective range of 50 meters. This weapon is designed for mid-range combat and offers a range of firing modes, including burst, charged, and full-auto, to enable rapid and flexible responses to changing tactical situations. In addition to its impressive firepower, the Karna Rifle is also highly regarded for its robust construction and reliability, making it a favored choice among Kastak Arms' extensive arsenal of weapons. Its popularity is a testament to its exceptional performance and durability in the field.
Karna Rifle.description: S3 assault rifle manufactured by Kastak Arms

S71 Rifle.location: The S71 Rifle is a semi-automatic assault rifle manufactured by Gemini. With a caliber of 5 mm, it boasts an effective range of 50 meters and comes with the OT4-RF (4x Telescopic) optics in its default loadout. Gemini's design of the S71 prioritizes ergonomics, making it an ideal weapon for mid-range engagements. Despite its smaller caliber round compared to other weapons in its class, the S71 has gained popularity among private military professionals due to its sleek aesthetics and precise accuracy.
S71 Rifle.description: S2 assault rifle manufactured by Gemini

Coda Pistol.location: The Coda Pistol is a semi-automatic pistol manufactured by Kastak Arms, commonly referred to as the "Hand Cannon". It is renowned for its ability to terminate an engagement with a single .50 caliber round and boasts an effective range of approximately 100 meters. However, the weapon's considerable power creates a significant recoil which can be challenging to manage. Due to its limited magazine capacity, sustained firing is not recommended. Instead, the weapon is best utilized for precise single shots.
Coda Pistol.description: S1 pistol manufactured by Kastak Arms

F55 LMG.location: The F55 LMG is a 5 mm rotary light machine gun manufactured by Gemini. With an effective range of 30 meters, it boasts an explosive rate of fire that peaks at 1000 rpm. The F55's sleek and professional styling is a testament to Gemini's commitment to quality. This light machine gun is designed for discerning clientele who demand the best and want to make a statement in the 'verse. The F55 is a formidable weapon that sends a clear message to anyone who dares to challenge its owner's authority.

"It's in the spirit of being a tube."

R97 Shotgun.location: The R97 Shotgun, produced by Gemini, is a semi-automatic 12-gauge shotgun that boasts a combination of sophisticated design and formidable stopping power, rendering it an effective close quarters weapon. The shotgun mode of the R97 has an effective range of 15 meters, while the single mode extends to 35 meters. The R97 is equipped with two fore modes, namely the semi-auto wide spread mode, which is ideal for inflicting swift damage, and the focused mode, which offers increased range at the cost of some power. This combat versatility has made the R97 a favored personal defense weapon throughout the Empire.

Bluemoon Fungus.location:
Wikelo is a Banu trader and mission giver based in Stanton. He is the first non-human NPC added to Star Citizen.

"Wikelo recently retired [...] from a fabrication Souli in the Banu Protectorate, he loves people, he loves humans, so he decided to move to human space and set up sort of a fabrication shop/trading site location for players to go visit and basically he can kind of make you some cool stuff if you bring him what he needs."
Bluemoon Fungus.description: Wikelo is a Banu trader based in Stanton.
